Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.RecordWriter

Packages that use RecordWriter
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API

  • Uses of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson that return RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordWriter
    BsonSerializer.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element RecordWriter using default session arguments.
    RecordWriter
    BsonSerializerSession.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Buffered array-element RecordWriter for BSON, bound to this live session.
    RecordWriter
    BsonSerializer.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Convenience delegator for the whole-value RecordWriter using default session arguments.
    RecordWriter
    BsonSerializerSession.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Opens a whole-value push generator targeting BSON output, bound to this live session.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that return RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordWriter
    CborSerializer.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Convenience delegator for the streaming array-element RecordWriter (uses default session args; see CborSerializer.serializeTokens(Object)).
    RecordWriter
    CborSerializerSession.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Streaming array-element RecordWriter backed by CborTokenWriter.

  • Uses of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs that return RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordWriter
    JcsSerializer.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Convenience delegator (default session args) for a record writer that emits canonical JCS for the value passed to write(...).
    RecordWriter
    JcsSerializerSession.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Returns a record writer that emits canonical JCS for each value passed to write(...) (delegates to this session's SerializerSession.serialize(Object, Object)).

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class

    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the JSON format.

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    Streaming array-element RecordWriter backed by JsonTokenWriter.
    RecordWriter
    JsonSchemaSerializer.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Convenience delegator (default session args) for a record writer that emits the JSON Schema for each value passed to write(...).
    RecordWriter
    JsonSchemaSerializerSession.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Returns a record writer that emits the JSON Schema for each value passed to write(...) (delegates to this session's SerializerSession.serialize(Object, Object)).

  • Uses of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller that return RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RecordWriter
    Bson.ofArrayRecords(Object output)
    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array using the Bson.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordWriter
    Cbor.ofArrayRecords(Object output)
    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array using the Cbor.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordWriter
    Jcs.ofArrayRecords(Object output)
    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array using the Jcs.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordWriter
    Json.ofArrayRecords(Object output)
    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array using the Json.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordWriter

    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array using the Json5.DEFAULT marshaller.

    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array using the Yaml.DEFAULT marshaller.
    static RecordWriter
    Bson.ofRecords(Object output)
    Opens a low-level RecordWriter cursor over the specified output using the Bson.DEFAULT marshaller.

    Marshaller.writeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each written value as one element of a top-level wire array.
    RecordWriter
    Marshaller.writeRecords(Object output)
    Opens a low-level RecordWriter cursor that emits each whole value as a record.

  • Uses of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack that implement RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MsgPackTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the MessagePack format.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack that return RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordWriter
    MsgPackSerializer.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Convenience delegator for the buffered array-element RecordWriter (uses default session args; see MsgPackSerializer.serializeTokens(Object)).
    RecordWriter
    MsgPackSerializer.serializeArrayRecords(Object output, int expectedCount)
    Convenience delegator for the streaming, count-prefixed array-element RecordWriter (uses default session args; see MsgPackSerializer.serializeTokens(Object)).
    RecordWriter
    MsgPackSerializerSession.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Buffered array-element RecordWriter.
    RecordWriter
    MsgPackSerializerSession.serializeArrayRecords(Object output, int expectedCount)
    Streaming array-element RecordWriter that pre-declares the element count and writes each element directly to the output stream — no per-element buffering.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    RecordWriter

    Convenience delegator for the whole-value RecordWriter using default session arguments.
    RecordWriter

  • Uses of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Subinterfaces of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    TokenWriter
    Public low-level push-generator that emits a Juneau-formatted document one structural event at a time.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream that return RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RecordWriter
    RecordAdapter.arrayWriter(SerializerSession session, Object output)
    Creates an array-element RecordWriter that buffers each write(...) call and emits the whole list on close().
    RecordWriter
    ArrayRecordWritable.serializeArrayRecords(Object output)
    Opens a RecordWriter that wraps each write(...) call as one element of a top-level wire array.
    default RecordWriter
    ArrayRecordWritable.serializeArrayRecords(Object output, int expectedCount)
    Variant of ArrayRecordWritable.serializeArrayRecords(Object) for length-prefixed binary formats that require the element count up front (msgpack, bson).
    RecordWriter
    RecordWritable.serializeRecords(Object output)
    Opens a low-level RecordWriter cursor over the specified output.
    default RecordWriter
    TokenWritable.serializeRecords(Object output)
    FULL formats get record semantics for free — a TokenWriter IS-A RecordWriter.
    RecordWriter
    RecordWriter.write(Object value)
    Emits one whole-value record.
    static RecordWriter
    RecordAdapter.writer(SerializerSession session, Object output)
    Creates a single-shot RecordWriter that delegates write(Object) calls to the session's serialize(...) entry point.
    static RecordWriter
    StreamingArrayRecord.writer(TokenWriter cursor)
    Wraps a TokenWriter as a streaming array-element RecordWriter.

  • Uses of RecordWriter in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with type arguments of type RecordWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.records(Consumer<RecordWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a RecordWriter (whole-value record cursor) using the default JSON serializer.
    static RecordStreamBody
    RecordStreamBody.records(Serializer serializer, Consumer<RecordWriter> consumer)
    Creates a body that streams via a RecordWriter (whole-value record cursor) using the given serializer.

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    RecordStreamBody.records(Consumer<RecordWriter> consumer)
